overall.description: Third-person perspective from a survival horror game showing a character approaching a foggy rural village at night. The character moves slowly through tall grass toward a distinctive twisted tree silhouette and village lights, with a full moon partially obscured by clouds overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with giant twisted tree landmark

events.description: character raises right hand to face, possibly using binoculars or shielding eyes while observing the village ahead

agents.ego_description: advancing slowly through tall grass toward the village, pausing briefly to raise hand for closer observation of the distant buildings

entered.detail: large gnarled dead tree silhouetted against the moonlit sky, dominating the center background
cluster of rural buildings with warm glowing windows suggesting habitation
leafless tree with twisted bare branches framing the left side of the view
fence line marking the boundary before the village entrance
bright full moon partially obscured by clouds providing ambient light
tall dry grass in the foreground swaying slightly in the wind

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the edge of a foggy rural village at night, surrounded by dense tall grass. A massive twisted ancient tree dominates the center background, silhouetted against a cloudy moonlit sky. To the right, village houses emit warm glowing light, contrasting with the cool blue darkness. The character slowly advances, briefly raising a hand to their face to observe the settlement more carefully.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, cautious approach from the edge of a dark wilderness toward the warm, inviting lights of a remote rural village. It begins with the character standing amidst dense tall grass, where the cool blue darkness of the night is punctuated by a massive, twisted ancient tree silhouetted against a cloudy moonlit sky. As the character advances, the perspective shifts closer to the settlement, drawing the viewer's eye from the oppressive shadows of the forest toward the glowing windows of nearby houses. The scene then tightens as the character briefly raises a hand to their face, peering through the fog to observe the village more carefully before continuing their steady movement toward the light.
